headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Slips, Nasdaq Gains As Intel Soars On Earnings (Live Coverage)

headline: Shares of semiconductor companies are trading higher amid sympathy with Intel, which reported better-than-expected Q1 financial results and issued Q2 guidance above estimates. Also, reports suggest that a strike action at a Samsung Electronics facility earlier this month led to lower production, which may boost sales for competitors.
